game_info.title: die-with-three-missed-blocks
game_info.concept:
Stack up the blocks as high as you can!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/stack/id1080487957

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Stack up the blocks as high as you can!

◉ Simple & Beautiful graphics designed
◉ Compete for the best score in the world
game_info.description: Stack is a precise 3D arcade game where you must build the tallest tower possible. Blocks slide in from the sides, and you must place them exactly on top of the previous block. Any overhang will be sliced off, making the target smaller for the next turn. If you miss the stack completely, the game is over.
game_info.controls:
- SPACE: Place the moving block
- ENTER: Start the game from the menu
- ESC: Pause or Unpause the game
- R: Restart the game after Game Over

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic block placement and stack growth.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test will simulate pressing SPACE when the moving block is within the bounds of the stack (using overlap calculation). It will do this for 5 blocks.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The stack height should increase to 5. The score should reflect 5 points. The game phase should remain PLAYING.

TEST_2.strategy_description: The test will force the moving block to align perfectly with the previous block's position before triggering the placement logic, simulating a perfect game for 20 blocks.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The stack should reach 20 blocks with no debris created (blocks maintain full size). Score should be 20.
TEST_2.strategy: The test will force the moving block to align perfectly with the previous block's position before triggering the placement logic, simulating a perfect game for 20 blocks.
TEST_2.expected: The stack should reach 20 blocks with no debris created (blocks maintain full size). Score should be 20.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify Game Over condition on miss.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The test will wait until the moving block is completely outside the bounds of the stack, then press SPACE.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The game phase should transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE. The stack height should stop increasing.

TEST_3.expected: The game phase should transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE. The stack height should stop increasing.
